Id1.text: Robert E Lee was a commander in the American Civil War when the Battle of Cold Harbor took place. Aaron S Daggett fought in this battle.

Id2.text: Aaron S. Daggett battled in the Battle of Cold Harbour which took place during the American Civil War. Robert E. Lee was a commander in the American Civil War.

Id3.text: Aaron S. Daggett fought in the American Civil War, Battle of Cold Harbour. Robert E Lee was a Civil War commander.
